reviews.comment:
Muy buen combustible, tiene muy buen servicio hotelero, su restó tiene buenos platos pero son extremadamente lentos con el servicio, 50 minutos para un plato

(Translated by Google)
Very good fuel, has very good hotel service, its restaurant has good dishes but they are extremely slow with the service, 50 minutes for a dish

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar a descansar y seguir camino al otro día. La comida muy buena...! Todo muy ordenado, limpio, buen trato y cordialidad. Muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop and rest before continuing your journey the next day. The food was excellent! Everything was very tidy and clean, and the service was friendly and helpful. Highly recommended.
